dataset_name: Mock data - Nguon slide cho AI Tutor co citation
description: Du lieu mau mo phong viec BTC hoac mentor nhap mo ta tai lieu/slide de AI tutor dung lam nguon tra loi thac mac kien thuc. Noi dung chi dung cho prototype, khong phai tai lieu chinh thuc.

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien nam duoc cau truc tong quan cua chuong trinh, cac nhom hoat dong chinh va cach chuong trinh van hanh.
records.summary: Chuong trinh gom cac phan tong quan, weekly runbook, support, danh gia/demo day, project allocation va launch readiness.
records.source_excerpt: Ban do chuong trinh gom Tong Quan, Weekly Runbook, Support, Danh Gia & Demo Day, Project Allocation, Launch Readiness.
records.citation_label: Workshop 1 - Kick-off, slide 2, Ban do chuong trinh
example_student_questions: Khoa hoc nay co nhung phan chinh nao?
Weekly runbook nghia la gi?
Em can theo doi nhung muc nao trong chuong trinh?

records.section_title: Quy mo va nhip van hanh
records.learning_objective: Hoc vien hieu quy mo lop, lich workshop, office hours va mentoring duty trong tuan.
records.summary: Sprint keo dai 6 tuan voi khoang 500 hoc vien, 167 teams, workshop hang tuan, office hours va mentoring duty de theo doi tien do.
records.source_excerpt: Lich trinh co 2 buoi Workshop, Office Hours, va 2 buoi Mentoring Duty moi tuan.
records.citation_label: Workshop 1 - Kick-off, slide 4, Quy mo va nhip van hanh
example_student_questions: Mentoring duty khac office hours nhu the nao?
Moi tuan co may buoi workshop?
Neu team bi ket thi nen hoi o dau?

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien phan biet muc tieu cua giai doan 1 va giai doan 2 trong sprint 6 tuan.
records.summary: Giai doan 1 tap trung phan tich, thiet ke va build core. Giai doan 2 tap trung optimize, deploy va chuan bi demo.
records.source_excerpt: GD1 - Tuan 1-3: phan tich, thiet ke va build nen tang cot loi. GD2 - Tuan 4-6: optimize, deploy va demo.
records.citation_label: Workshop 1 - Kick-off, slide 6, Hai giai doan chinh
example_student_questions: Tuan 1 den 3 can tap trung vao gi?
Khi nao bat dau deploy?
Core hoan thien nghia la gi?

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien biet cach chuyen pain co bang chung thanh problem statement ro rang.
records.summary: Problem statement can neu user cu the, pain co bang chung, boi canh xay ra pain va vi sao pain dang duoc giai quyet.
records.source_excerpt: Dung bat dau bang giai phap. Hay bat dau bang user, pain, evidence va context.
records.citation_label: Workshop 2 - Problem to MVP Canvas, slide 3, Tu pain den problem statement
example_student_questions: Pain va problem khac nhau the nao?
Lam sao biet pain co that?
Problem statement nen viet nhu the nao?

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien biet cat MVP thanh mot lat cat nho gom mot user, mot task, mot AI decision va mot output.
records.summary: Build slice giup team tranh build ca app qua som. Lat cat tot phai test duoc gia tri AI trong mot workflow hep.
records.source_excerpt: Mot user, mot task, mot AI decision, mot output. Khong build ca app.
records.citation_label: Workshop 2 - Problem to MVP Canvas, slide 7, Build slice
example_student_questions: Build slice la gi?
Vi sao khong nen build ca app ngay?
Voi AI tutor thi build slice nen la gi?

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien hieu LLM khi nao chi tra loi text va khi nao can goi tool de lay du lieu hoac thuc hien hanh dong.
records.summary: Tool calling cho phep agent goi ham hoac API ben ngoai khi can thong tin moi, tinh toan, truy xuat database hoac thuc hien tac vu.
records.source_excerpt: LLM khong nen tu suy dien khi co the dung tool de lay du lieu chinh xac hon.
records.citation_label: Workshop 7 - First Working Agent, slide 4, LLM va tool calling
example_student_questions: Tool calling la gi?
Khi nao agent can goi tool?
Khac nhau giua prompt thuong va tool calling?

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien hieu RAG la cach ket hop retrieval tu nguon tai lieu voi LLM de tra loi co can cu.
records.summary: RAG giup AI tra loi dua tren tai lieu duoc truy xuat thay vi chi dua vao tri thuc san co cua model.
records.source_excerpt: RAG = retrieve relevant context + generate grounded answer.
records.citation_label: Workshop 8 - RAG Pipeline, slide 2, RAG la gi
example_student_questions: RAG la gi?
Vi sao AI tutor can RAG?
RAG giup giam hallucination nhu the nao?

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien hieu kich thuoc chunk, overlap va metadata anh huong den chat luong retrieval.
records.summary: Chunk qua ngan co the mat ngu canh, chunk qua dai co the nhieu nhieu va lam retrieval kem chinh xac. Metadata giup loc va cite nguon tot hon.
records.source_excerpt: Chunking can can bang giua du ngu canh va do chinh xac khi truy xuat.
records.citation_label: Workshop 8 - RAG Pipeline, slide 5, Chunking va retrieval quality
example_student_questions: Chunking anh huong the nao den retrieval?
Chunk qua dai co van de gi?
Co nen dung metadata khi index tai lieu khong?

records.section_title: Cac truong hop AI khong nen tra loi truc tiep
records.learning_objective: Hoc vien hieu vi sao AI tutor khong lam ho lab, gate hoac bai kiem tra.
records.summary: AI can tu choi hoac chuyen sang hint ladder khi yeu cau co dau hieu xin loi giai hoan chinh cho bai nop.
records.source_excerpt: Guardrail tot khong chi noi khong; no chuyen nguoi hoc sang goi y, cau hoi dan dat va review phan da lam.
records.citation_label: Workshop 12 - Guardrails & Reliability, slide 3, AI khong nen tra loi truc tiep
example_student_questions: Vi sao AI khong cho em dap an lab?
Hint ladder la gi?
AI co the review code cua em thay vi viet ho khong?

records.learning_objective: Hoc vien hieu cac tin hieu can theo doi sau khi deploy san pham AI.
records.summary: Sau khi go live, team can theo doi error, latency, cost, user feedback va chat luong cau tra loi cua AI.
records.source_excerpt: San pham AI can observability cho ca he thong ky thuat va chat luong AI output.
records.citation_label: Workshop 13 - Go Live, slide 6, Observability sau khi deploy
example_student_questions: Sau khi deploy AI app can theo doi gi?
Latency va cost co quan trong khong?
Lam sao biet AI output dang xau di?
